name.zh: 阿图瓦诺曼底巴塞特犬

origin.zh: 法国阿图瓦和诺曼底地区

history.en: Developed in France from the older Basset d'Artois and Basset Normand breeds, standardized around 1924 by Léon Verrier for hunting small game like rabbit and hare either alone or in packs
history.zh: 在法国由古老的阿图瓦巴吉度犬和诺曼底巴吉度犬培育而成，1924年左右由莱昂·韦里耶标准化，用于单独或成群狩猎兔子、野兔等小型猎物。

overview.en: The Basset Artésien Normand is a charming hound breed known for its affectionate, calm, and gentle nature. Despite its short legs and long body, it is an intelligent and friendly dog that makes an excellent family companion. Originally bred for hunting small game, it retains a strong prey drive and a keen sense of smell. This breed is typically good-natured, patient with children, and gets along well with other dogs, though it may be reserved with strangers. Its moderate energy level means it enjoys both playtime and lounging around the house. However, its independent streak can sometimes make it stubborn, so consistent training from an early age is important.
overview.zh: 阿图瓦诺曼底巴塞特犬是一种迷人的猎犬品种，以其深情、冷静和温和的性格而闻名。尽管腿短身长，但它聪明友善，是优秀的家庭伴侣。该犬种最初用于猎捕小型猎物，保留了强烈的猎物驱动力和敏锐的嗅觉。它通常性情温和，对孩子有耐心，能与其他狗友好相处，但可能对陌生人有所保留。其适中的能量水平意味着它既喜欢玩耍，也喜欢在家闲逛。然而，它的独立性格有时会使其固执，因此从小进行持续训练很重要。

care.en: Daily care for the Basset Artésien Normand includes regular grooming to manage moderate shedding. Brush its short, dense coat weekly with a rubber curry brush or hound glove to remove loose hair and distribute skin oils. Bathe only when necessary to avoid stripping natural oils. Check and clean its long, droopy ears weekly to prevent infections, as they are prone to moisture buildup. Trim nails monthly and brush teeth several times a week. Exercise needs are moderate: a daily walk of 30–45 minutes plus some playtime in a securely fenced yard. Avoid overexertion due to its short legs and long back, which can be prone to spinal issues. Regular vet check-ups are essential to monitor for common health problems like hip dysplasia, ear infections, and obesity.
care.zh: 阿图瓦诺曼底巴塞特犬的日常护理包括定期梳理以控制适度掉毛。每周用橡胶咖喱梳或猎犬手套梳理其短而密的被毛，去除死毛并分布皮肤油脂。仅在必要时洗澡，以免去除天然油脂。每周检查和清洁其长而下垂的耳朵，防止感染，因为耳朵容易积聚湿气。每月修剪指甲，每周刷牙数次。运动需求适中：每天散步30-45分钟，并在有安全围栏的院子里玩耍。由于其腿短背长，易患脊柱问题，避免过度运动。定期兽医检查至关重要，以监测髋关节发育不良、耳部感染和肥胖等常见健康问题。

training.en: Training a Basset Artésien Normand requires patience, consistency, and positive reinforcement. This breed is intelligent but can be stubborn, so harsh methods are counterproductive. Start with basic obedience commands like sit, stay, and come, using treats and praise as rewards. Keep training sessions short (10–15 minutes) to maintain its interest. Socialization from puppyhood is crucial: expose it to various people, dogs, and environments to prevent shyness or aggression. Because of its hunting background, recall training is important but challenging—use high-value treats and practice in a safe, enclosed area. Avoid repetitive drills; instead, incorporate fun activities like scent games to engage its natural abilities. Crate training can help with housebreaking and provide a safe den.
training.zh: 训练阿图瓦诺曼底巴塞特犬需要耐心、一致性和积极强化。该犬种聪明但可能固执，因此严厉的方法适得其反。从基本服从命令开始，如坐、等待和过来，使用零食和表扬作为奖励。保持训练时间短（10-15分钟）以维持其兴趣。从小社会化至关重要：让它接触不同的人、狗和环境，以防止害羞或攻击性。由于它的狩猎背景，召回训练很重要但具有挑战性——使用高价值零食，在安全围栏区域练习。避免重复训练；相反，加入气味游戏等有趣的活动来发挥其天性。笼内训练有助于居家训练，并提供安全的巢穴。

diet.en: Feed your Basset Artésien Normand a high-quality dog food appropriate for its age, size, and activity level. This breed is prone to obesity, so measure portions and limit treats. Divide daily food into two meals to prevent bloat, a risk in deep-chested dogs. Look for foods with real meat as the first ingredient and balanced omega fatty acids for coat health. Avoid overfeeding and monitor body condition regularly. Puppies need three to four smaller meals daily until six months old, then transition to two meals. Provide fresh water at all times. Consult your vet for specific dietary recommendations, especially if your dog has allergies or health issues. Avoid table scraps and foods toxic to dogs like chocolate, grapes, and onions.
diet.zh: 为阿图瓦诺曼底巴塞特犬提供适合其年龄、体型和活动水平的高质量狗粮。该犬种易肥胖，因此要测量分量并限制零食。将每日食物分成两餐，以预防胃胀气（深胸犬种的风险）。选择以真正肉类为首要成分、含平衡欧米伽脂肪酸以维护毛发健康的狗粮。避免过度喂食，定期监测体况。幼犬每天需三到四餐，直到六个月大，然后过渡到两餐。始终提供新鲜饮用水。咨询兽医获取具体饮食建议，尤其当您的狗有过敏或健康问题时。避免喂食餐桌残渣和对狗有毒的食物，如巧克力、葡萄和洋葱。

livingTips.en: The Basset Artésien Normand adapts well to various living situations, including apartments, as long as it gets daily exercise. It is a relatively quiet breed indoors but may bay or howl when excited. A securely fenced yard is ideal for safe exploration, but it should not be left alone outdoors unsupervised due to its strong prey drive. This breed is excellent with children, being patient and gentle, but supervision is recommended with very young kids to prevent accidental falls. It generally gets along well with other dogs and can coexist with cats if raised together, but may chase small pets due to its hunting instincts. Early socialization is key. It prefers moderate climates and may be sensitive to extreme heat or cold. Provide a comfortable bed and avoid stairs or jumping to protect its long back.
livingTips.zh: 阿图瓦诺曼底巴塞特犬能适应各种生活环境，包括公寓，只要每天得到锻炼。它在室内相对安静，但兴奋时可能会吠叫或嚎叫。有安全围栏的院子是理想的安全探索空间，但由于其强烈的猎物驱动力，不应无人看管地留在户外。该犬种对孩子极好，耐心且温和，但建议在非常年幼的孩子旁边监督，以防意外摔倒。它通常能与其他狗友好相处，如果一起养大，也能与猫共存，但可能因狩猎本能追逐小宠物。早期社会化是关键。它偏好温和气候，可能对极端高温或寒冷敏感。提供舒适的床，避免上下楼梯或跳跃以保护其长背。
